mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.user_id, u.name AS user_name, t.type, t.category, t.workflow, t.priority, t.planned_start, t.planned_end, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM task ch WHERE ch.parent_id = t.id AND ch.status = 'T1' ) THEN t.sub_progress ELSE t.progress END AS progress, t.parent_id, t.version_id, t.is_public, t.creator FROM task t JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND t.status = 'T1'

SELECT DISTINCT p.user_id AS id, u.name, MAX(r.is_assignee) AS is_assignee FROM project_member p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN role_mapping rm ON p.id = rm.member_id JOIN roles r ON r.id = rm.role_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} AND rm.is_delete = 'F0' AND p.is_delete = 'F0' GROUP BY p.user_id, u.name
SELECT group_value AS cgroup, com_value AS id, com_name AS name FROM common_code WHERE is_use = 1

{ CALL proc_insert_task( #{projectId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workflow, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plannedStart, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{plannedEnd, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{actualStart, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{actualEnd, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{estimatedTime, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{progress, mode=IN, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{parentId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPublic, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileDetails, mode=IN, jdbcType=ARRAY, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.FileDetailTypeHandler}, #{id, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL GET_TASK_DETAIL( #{id, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionName, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workflow, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reject, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plannedStart, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{plannedEnd, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{actualStart, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{actualEnd, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{estimatedTime, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{progress, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subProgress, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{parentId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentName, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPublic, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{journalList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=journalResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{timeList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=timeResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{replyList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=replyResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{fileList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=fileResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{childTaskList, mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=childResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler}, #{linkedTaskList,mode=OUT, jdbcType=CURSOR, javaType=java.sql.ResultSet, resultMap=linkedResultMap, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.CursorTypeHandler} ) }
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('task_reply') FROM dual
INSERT INTO task_reply(id, task_id, user_id, content, created_on, parent_id) VALUES(#{id}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{parentId})
mapper.select: SELECT tt.name AS type, tc.name AS category, cc1.com_name AS priority, u1.name || '(' || t.user_id || ')' AS user_id, u2.name || '(' || t.creator || ')' creator, cc2.com_name AS workflow, NVL(v.name, '없음') AS version_id FROM task t JOIN task_type tt ON tt.id = t.type JOIN task_category tc ON tc.id = t.category JOIN common_code cc1 ON cc1.com_value = t.priority JOIN users u1 ON u1.id = t.user_id JOIN users u2 ON u2.id = t.creator JOIN common_code cc2 ON cc2.com_value = t.workflow LEFT JOIN version v ON v.id = t.version_id WHERE t.project_id = #{id} AND t.status = 'T1' ORDER BY priority

SELECT s.id, s.task_id, t.title AS task_title, t.project_id, p.title AS project_title, t.type, t.category, s.user_id, u.name, s.description, s.activity_type, s.task_start, s.spent FROM time s JOIN task t ON t.id = s.task_id JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.id JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id} OR p.parent_id = #{id}

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.title AS task_title, t.project_id, p.title AS project_title, t.version_id, v.name AS version_name, t.user_id, u.name, t.planned_start, t.planned_end, t.actual_start, t.actual_end, cc1.com_name AS priority, cc2.com_name AS workflow, tt.name AS type, tc.name AS category, t.progress, t.sub_progress, t.parent_id FROM task t JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id LEFT JOIN version v ON v.id = t.version_id JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id JOIN common_code cc1 ON cc1.com_value = t.priority JOIN common_code cc2 ON cc2.com_value = t.workflow JOIN task_type tt ON tt.id = t.type JOIN task_category tc ON tc.id = t.category WHERE (p.id = #{id} OR p.parent_id = #{id}) AND t.status = 'T1'

SELECT tr.task_id, tr.related_task_id, cc.com_name AS relation_type FROM task_relations tr JOIN common_code cc ON tr.relation_type = cc.com_value JOIN task t ON tr.task_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id WHERE (p.id = #{id} OR p.parent_id = #{id}) AND t.status = 'T1'
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.default_status, t.description, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task a WHERE a.type = t.id) AS is_used FROM task_type t
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.description, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task a WHERE a.category = t.id) AS is_used FROM task_category t
